title: Particle Life
description: Emergence engine: watch alien life forms evolve from simple species-attraction rules you configure in real time.
concept: Particle Life (the 'primordial soup' algorithm) simulates N species of particles where each pair of species has a configurable attraction/repulsion force. Simple rules produce stunning emergent behaviors — predator-prey spirals, crystalline clusters, mutualistic swarms. An interactive matrix lets you drag-adjust every species interaction. Five presets span chaos, symbiosis, predator cycles, orbital rings, and crystal formation.
features: 6 presets: Chaos, Symbiosis, Predators, Orbits, Crystals, Shuffle
Configurable attraction matrix — drag cells left/right to tune each species pair
2–6 species with 30–150 particles each (up to 900 total)
Speed, interaction range, and friction sliders
Touch + mobile support, 60fps with Float32Array typed buffers

interaction.mouse: Move to observe — particles respond to canvas interactions
interaction.click: Buttons and matrix cells are clickable; drag matrix cells to adjust attraction
interaction.touch: Touch-draggable matrix cells; all controls work on mobile
